signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Chatter | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Chatter | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now center on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (e.g., 1120-1159 at 28%) and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?" (1120-1159 at 18-28% across updates).[2][3][4]  
These tweet markets show high trading

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Vote Delayed Potentially to Second Week of May** | YES | MED confidence
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Vote Delayed Potentially to Second Week of May** | YES | MED confidence

The Senate Banking Committee faces a Friday deadline to notice a markup of the CLARITY Act for a vote the week of April 27[7]. However, mounting pressure from banks wanting input on stablecoin yield issues, combined with Senator Thom Tillis's desire to hear them out, could push the markup to the second week
